title: Record: SP4096 + Polar Express + MuonEq-R + Depth Recurrence — 1.0923 BPB (3-seed)
author: Omrigotlieb
body:
## Summary

- **val_bpb: 1.0923** (3-seed mean, std 0.0005) — beats SOTA (1.1147) by **0.0224 BPB**
- **Artifact: 15.69 MB** (under 16,000,000 bytes)
- **Clean submission** — no SLOT, no TTT
- **8×H100 SXM**, PyTorch 2.9.1+cu128, 600s training

### Results

| Seed | Sliding BPB | Steps | Artifact |
|------|------------|-------|----------|
| 1337 | **1.0927** | 4,797 | 15,692,264 |
| 42 | **1.0917** | 4,795 | 15,698,922 |
| 2025 | **1.0925** | 4,795 | 15,691,117 |
| **Mean** | **1.0923 ±0.0005** | | |

### Innovations (on clarkkev PR #1218 SP4096 base)

1. **Polar Express Newton-Schulz** (arXiv:2505.16932) — 4 minimax-optimal NS steps
2. **MuonEq-R** — row-normalize gradient before NS orthogonalization
3. **Depth Recurrence** layers 3,4,5 — shared MLP weights, 14 virtual layers from 11 physical
4. **WD=0.105** — higher weight decay for quantization-friendly compression
5. **MLR=0.022** — tuned matrix LR to recover quality from higher WD

### Run Command

```bash
RECUR_LAYERS=3,4,5 MUON_WD=0.105 EMBED_WD=0.105 MATRIX_LR=0.022 \
MUON_BACKEND_STEPS=4 SEED=1337 \
torchrun --standalone --nproc_per_node=8 train_gpt.py
```

## Test plan
- [x] 3-seed validation (1337, 42, 2025)
- [x] All artifacts under 16,000,000 bytes
- [x] Clean — no SLOT, no TTT
- [x] Statistical significance: gap=0.0224, z=44.8 (p << 0.01)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
